previousStarts.stewardsComment: Utilised the sprint lane in the run to the finish.

form.formComment: Good performance when beaten by 4.5 m finishing third after being driven well back, behind Majorita Jujon at this track over 2138m in a 4yo+ NR 50 or better M on March 28 at $8. Then a handy effort when beaten by 4 m finishing second behind Tough Shaz at this track over 1660m in a 4yo+ NR 50 or better M on April 4 at $4.40. Rates highly. Draws wider but looks close to a win,

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Failed to run on over the concluding stages as may have been expected.
Worked forward to the lead approaching the 1200m.
Raced three wide in the middle stages.

Readied with a couple of trials so looking for a good return,

Locked stays for a short distance in the back straight on the final lap.

form.formComment: Didn't do much at the last run, was driven from back in the field when 7th (Fr4) over 1660m after racing wide at this track, beaten 22 m by Tough Shaz (1:56.10) in 4yo+ NR 50 or better M on April 4 at $23. Before that 7th (Fr2) over 1660m at this track, beaten 12 m by Great White (1:55.00) in NR up to 75 on March 28 at $3.90. Must do a lot more.
